measurement_note: Size is P, the number of point rows. The 12/48/96 tiers span 8x. Coordinates (i, 2i) make every unordered pair non-degenerate, so the result contains P(P-1)/2 rows and exercises pair generation plus the required sort. The direct self-join takes O(P^2 log P) time including output ordering. A correct query that performs a full correlated Points scan while computing every pair area takes O(P^3), completes normally at P = 96, and is rejected by scaling.

cases.name: benchmark: 12 points with every pair valid
benchmark: 48 points with every pair valid
benchmark: 96 points with every pair valid
